verdict: Shai Gilgeous-Alexander is an elite, franchise-altering point guard consistently performing at a 99.8th percentile level.
strengths: His unparalleled efficiency and ability to add nearly 20 wins make him a cornerstone player who guarantees playoff contention.
concern: The only "concern" is managing his future contract given his requested salary is severely below his fair market value.
recommendation: Sign Shai Gilgeous-Alexander immediately to a max contract; his requested salary is an unprecedented bargain.
audio_summary: Shai Gilgeous-Alexander is a generational talent who adds 19.5 wins, transforming a 38-win team into a 57-win contender with 100% playoff probability. Securing him long-term at his current requested salary is an absolute no-brainer for the front office.
